judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly states that Lula was 'inocentado' (acquitted/declared innocent), which conflates the annulment of convictions on procedural grounds with a declaration of innocence on the merits of the case.
The model incorrectly states that Lula was inocentado, implying he was declared innocent, when in fact his convictions were annulled on procedural grounds.

The response correctly mentions the jurisdictional annulment but critically conflates it with being 'inocentado' (acquitted/found innocent), which is factually wrong — the convictions were annulled on procedural grounds, not because Lula was declared innocent.
